confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of loop deployment and positioning sequence. Loop placement appears accurate relative to target mark. Cinching appears complete though exact tightness is difficult to assess from this viewing angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from target mark due to viewing angle
Precise assessment of final loop tightness quality
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with systematic approach to loop deployment and positioning. Primary time loss occurred during cinching phase (45s vs 15-25s expert benchmark).
strengths: No apparent tissue damage or transection
improvement_suggestions: Practice more efficient cinching technique to reduce from 45s to under 25s
Consider more direct approach to loop tightening
